l01.description: Overdrive bonuses are increased by {0}. Overdrive ends whenever Rafa's Action Skill ends.

l02.description: Whenever Rafa retriggers his Action Skill, he spawns a free Grenade. If he has a Grenade equipped, he spawns one based on that. This Skill has a {0} second cooldown.

l03.description: Whenever Peacebreaker Cannons fire at an enemy, gain a Stack of Instigator and lose all Stacks when Peacebreaker Cannons fire at a new enemy. Rafa gains {0} Gun Damage for every Stack of Instigator.
l03.red_text: El muerto al pozo, y el vivo al destrozo.

l04.description: APOPHIS Lance gains a {0} Chance to not consume Charges. The more Charges used at once, the greater the Chance.

l05.description: Rafa's Melee Attacks gain a {0} Critical Hit Chance. Critical Hits with Melee Attacks restore {1} of Action Skill Duration.

l06.description: Whenever Rafa throws a Grenade or Tediore Gun, he throws an additional one.
l06.red_text: Hay tres categorías humanas: el hombre mudo, el hombre de letras, y el hombre explosivo.

raid1.description: Rafa deals increased Ordnance and Gun Damage the faster he moves. While Overdrive is active, this bonus is doubled.

cowbell.description: Melee Damage has a chance to cause a Blade Storm for 5 seconds, dealing [kinetic_icon][kinetic]Kinetic Melee Damage[/kinetic] based on Damage Dealt. Action Skill Melee Damage have double the chance. Up to 3 Blade Storm's can be active at a time.
cowbell.red_text: Cada quien tiene la muerte que se busca.

filantropo.description: On Action Skill Retrigger spawn a free grenade. If you have a Grenade equipped, spawn a copy of that grenade instead.
